filters.q: has:attachment filename:pdf newer_than:30d (label:to-process/invoice OR from:noreply@grupoyour.com OR from:noreply@weoinvoice.com OR from:noreply@factura.grenke.pt OR from:payments-noreply@google.com OR from:noreply@documentos.meoempresas.pt OR from:geral@alcocheteup.pt OR from:no_reply@mun-montijo.pt OR from:extractoelectronico@extracto.viaverde.pt OR from:apoiocliente@prio.pt OR from:no-reply@bbvacf.pt)

parameters.jsCode: let items = $input.all(); let results = []; const EXCLUDE_PREFIXES = [/^Detalhe_/i, /^News_/i]; const seenMessages = new Set(); const BASE_FOLDER_ID = '1e6LXLUDgJHVplJlh9MTSYs-GL62Ahv30'; const folderIds = {}; const emailItems = []; for (const item of items) { if (item.json.monthYear && item.json.id && !item.json.internalDate) { folderIds[item.json.monthYear] = item.json.id; } else if (item.json.internalDate || item.json.id) { emailItems.push(item); } } seenMessages.clear(); for (const item of emailItems) { const rawDate = item.json.internalDate || item.json.date || item.json.headers?.date || null; if (!rawDate && !item.json.id) continue; let date; if (rawDate && !isNaN(rawDate)) date = new Date(Number(rawDate)); else if (rawDate) date = new Date(rawDate); else date = new Date(); if (isNaN(date.getTime())) date = new Date(); const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const year = date.getFullYear(); const monthYear = month + '-' + year; const msgId = item.json.id || item.json.messageId || JSON.stringify(item.json); if (seenMessages.has(msgId)) continue; seenMessages.add(msgId); if (item.binary) { for (const key of Object.keys(item.binary)) { const bin = item.binary[key]; const fileName = (bin.fileName || '').trim(); const isPdf = (bin.mimeType && bin.mimeType.toLowerCase().includes('pdf')) || fileNameLc.endsWith('.pdf'); if (!isPdf) continue; if (EXCLUDE_PREFIXES.some((re) => re.test(fileName))) continue; const folderId = folderIds[monthYear] || BASE_FOLDER_ID; results.push({ json: { monthYear, fileName, folderId }, binary: { data: bin } }); } } } return results;

const items = $input.all(); const folderCounts = {}; let totalFiles = 0; const octaCounts = { uploaded: 0, failed: 0, error: 0, skipped: 0 }; for (const item of items) { const folder = item.json.folderId || "unknown"; if (!folderCounts[folder]) folderCounts[folder] = 0; folderCounts[folder]++; totalFiles++; const s = item.json.octaStatus || "unknown"; if (octaCounts[s] !== undefined) octaCounts[s]++; } const msg = "Monthly Invoice extracts completed. Total: " + totalFiles + " files. Google Drive: " + Object.keys(folderCounts).join(", ") + ". Octa Manager: " + octaCounts.uploaded + " uploaded, " + octaCounts.failed + " failed."; return [{ json: { message: msg, totalFiles, octaUploaded: octaCounts.uploaded, webhook_secret: "n8n-webhook-secret-2024", webhook_url: "http://192.168.50.11:8644/webhooks/n8n-complete" } }];

parameters.workflowInputs: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: "Notificar o chefe que as faturas mensais foram processadas com sucesso.", webhook_secret: "n8n-webhook-secret-2024", webhook_url: "http://192.168.50.11:8644/webhooks/n8n-complete" }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const emails = $input.all(); const monthYears = new Set(); for (const email of emails) { const rawDate = email.json.internalDate || email.json.date || email.json.headers?.date || null; let date; if (rawDate && !isNaN(rawDate)) date = new Date(Number(rawDate)); else if (rawDate) date = new Date(rawDate); else date = new Date(); if (isNaN(date.getTime())) date = new Date(); const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const year = date.getFullYear(); monthYears.add(month + '-' + year); } return Array.from(monthYears).map(my => ({ json: { monthYear: my } }));
